title: Suzy's Suet Squares
description: A crumbly and sweet dessert with a crunchy crust, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Grease a casserole tin and line with parchment paper.
Mix the crushed biscuits and melted suet in a bowl until well combined.
Press the mixture into the prepared tin.
Mix the sugar and melted suet in a separate bowl until well combined.
Pour the sugar mixture over the biscuit mixture in the tin.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
